data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Priority booking (members book before public)', but the evidence does not confirm that this functionality is implemented. While the linked use case mentions that members get a 7-day advance booking compared to 3 days for non-members, there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates the actual implementation of this priority booking feature. Therefore, the validation reveals a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of priority booking for members.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
